zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Brome II於大約1332年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親William de Brome III23歲，母親Hawise Halways21歲。他於大約1355年與Margery Brooke結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1389年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Brome II于大约1332年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲William de Brome III23岁，母亲Hawise Halways21岁。他于大约1355年与Margery Brooke结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1389年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Brome II was born about 1332, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Brome III, was 23 and his mother, Hawise Halways, was 21. He married Margery Brooke about 1355. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1389, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Brome II est né environ 1332, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Brome III, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hawise Halways, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margery Brooke environ 1355. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1389, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Brome II um 1332 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Brome III 23 und seine Mutter Hawise Halways 21. Er hat um 1355 Margery Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1389 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Brome II è nato il circa 1332 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Brome III, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Halways, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margery Brooke circa 1355. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1389, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Brome IIが約1332年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Brome IIIは23歳，母Hawise Halwaysは21歳であった。約1355年にMargery Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1389年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Brome II(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Brome III(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Halways(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1355년 Margery Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Brome II nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Brome III, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Halways, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Brooke aproximadamente 1355. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1389, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Brome II родился около 1332 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Brome III было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Halways, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Brooke около 1355 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1389 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Brome II nació aproximadamente 1332, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Brome III, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Hawise Halways, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margery Brooke aproximadamente 1355. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1389, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
